roa.docketEntryComment: DA REQUEST ADD TO CALENDAR TO RECALL BW & DISMISS PER PC 1381 FILED
DEF ATC MOT TO RECALL BW, FILED

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 09-01-21 (10)/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPSDEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,//SA2: 170 O'FARRELL ST SF CA/SAORD/SAORD3/CONTD:  PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE:1 HR/DOP/
/CAL: DEFENDANT MOTION TO RECALL BW/X: OFF CALENDAR, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/NB/BWNUM:1ST/X: 2 OF 2  BENCHWARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE /NIGHTSERV/
